mainDressCode.title: Attire Guide
mainDressCode.description: Formal or semi-formal. Please wear white and soft purple (cream, ivory, and lavender count).

sections.title: Principal Sponsors
sections.description: Men: Dark suit, white shirt, soft purple tie or pocket square. Women: Floor-length gown in white, ivory, or soft purple.

sections.title: Guests
sections.shortDescription: Men: Long sleeves, trousers, dress shoes. Women: Dress in white or soft purple. No denim, t-shirts, or sneakers.
sections.description: Men: Long sleeves, trousers, dress shoes. Women: Dress in white or soft purple. No denim, t-shirts, or sneakers.
